subcodes.first_line: O My Leaf! Upon thee be My glory! In this year, from among the wondrous favors of God - exalted be His glory - a number of Afnán [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ورقتی علیک بهائی در این سنه از بدایع عنایات حق جل جلاله جمعی از افنان
subcodes.subjects: @law of pilgrimage, @Shrines and Holy places, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
